products.name: AutoCount Accounting
products.pitch: Improve accounting control, reporting speed, and day-to-day finance visibility.

products.name: AutoCount POS
products.pitch: Upgrade in-store sales handling, stock sync, and branch reporting.

products.name: Presoft Mobile Stock
products.pitch: Give sales teams live stock visibility and reduce order mistakes on the road.

products.name: Cubehous WMS
products.pitch: Tighten warehouse control, trace stock movement, and improve picking accuracy.

products.name: AutoCount Payroll
products.pitch: Simplify payroll processing, staff records, and monthly compliance work.
